message:
feat(raptorq): add schema-aligned failure context to GF256 and systematic tests

Instrument existing GF256 and systematic encoder test assertions with
structured failure context fields (scenario_id, seed, parameter_set,
replay_ref) to satisfy the D5/D7 schema-aligned failure logging
requirement.

gf256.rs:
- Add failure_context() helper generating structured context strings
- mul_slice_large_inputs: add RQ-U-GF256-ALGEBRA context with
  replay:rq-u-gf256-simd-scalar-equivalence-v1
- addmul_slice_large_inputs: same context pattern
- nibble_tables_exhaustive: add per-(c,x) context with
  replay:rq-u-gf256-nibble-table-v1
- simd_vs_scalar_mul_equivalence: add per-(len,c) context
- simd_vs_scalar_addmul_equivalence: add per-(len,c) context

systematic.rs:
- Add failure_context() helper with k and symbol_size parameters
- repair_symbol_matches_rfc_equation_terms: add
  RQ-U-SYSTEMATIC-RFC-EQUATION context with replay ref
- emitted_repair_degree_matches_rfc_equation_width: add
  RQ-U-SYSTEMATIC-DEGREE-METADATA context
- same_source_same_repair_across_seeds: add
  RQ-U-DETERMINISM-SEED context
- stats_overhead_ratio: add RQ-U-SYSTEMATIC-OVERHEAD-RATIO context

All replay_ref values follow the replay:rq-u-* naming convention
established by the D9 replay catalog.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
